channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [FRACTAL] Fractal Analytics Approves FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fractal Analytics Ltd's board approved the audited consolidated and standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. B S R & Co. LLP issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results. The board also approved the merger of Senseforth Inc. with Fractal Analytics Inc. to simplify the corporate structure and approved the liquidation of Fractal Frontiers Inc. to streamline the legal entity structure.

  • Fractal Analytics board approves audited financial results for FY26.
  • Senseforth Inc. to merge with Fractal Analytics Inc.
  • Fractal Frontiers Inc. liquidation approved for efficiency.
  • Auditors B S R & Co. LLP issue unmodified opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRACTAL | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BIRET] Brookfield India REIT Announces Audited FY26 Financial Results
item.description:
Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT has disclosed its audited standalone and consolidated financial statements for the year ended March 31, 2026, following board approval. The financial statements, along with the Statutory Auditors' report, are subject to Unitholders' approval at the upcoming Annual Meeting. The filing includes a declaration regarding unmodified opinion on the audited financial statements and details of related party transactions. These documents are available on the company's website.

  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial statements for FY26 released.
  • Statutory Auditors' report included, pending Unitholders' approval.
  • Declaration of unmodified opinion on audited financial statements provided.
  • Related party transactions detailed in standalone and consolidated statements.
  • Financial documents available on Brookfield India REIT website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NIACL] New India Assurance: FY26 Dividend Record Date Set
item.description:
The New India Assurance Company Ltd has announced the record date for the payment of dividend for the financial year 2025-26 as 4th September 2026. This decision was made during the Board of Directors meeting held on May 11, 2026, where the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, were also approved. The board recommended a final dividend of ₹1.50 per equity share of face value ₹5, subject to shareholder approval at the Annual General Meeting. Additionally, the service of M/s MUF(3 Intime India Private Limited as Registrar and Transfer Agent has been extended.

  • Record date for FY26 dividend is set for September 4, 2026.
  • Board approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • Final dividend of ₹1.50 per share recommended, pending shareholder approval.
  • M/s MUF(3 Intime India Private Limited service as R&TA extended.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: The New India Assurance Company Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [CLNINDIA] Sudarshan Colorants: FY26 Revenue ₹780.63 Cr
item.description:
Sudarshan Colorants India Ltd. announced audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Key highlights include revenue from operations of ₹780.63 Cr for FY26, compared to ₹825.06 Cr in FY25. The Board also approved the appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers Services LLP as Internal Auditor for FY27 and Mr. Nilkanth Natu as Interim CFO, effective May 11, 2026.

  • FY26 revenue from operations stood at ₹780.63 Cr.
  • PricewaterhouseCoopers Services LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Nilkanth Natu appointed as Interim CFO, effective May 11, 2026.
  • Board authorized key managerial personnel for materiality determination and disclosures.
  • The Board Meeting concluded at 8:00 p.m. (IST) on May 11, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CLARIANT CHEMICALS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [FRACTAL] Fractal Analytics Approves FY26 Financial Results, Merger & Liquidation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fractal Analytics Ltd's board approved the audited consolidated and standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. They also approved the merger of Senseforth US with Fractal US to simplify the corporate structure and the liquidation of Fractal Frontiers Inc. to streamline the legal entity structure. B S R & Co. LLP issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results. The trading window will be closed until May 13, 2026.

  • Audited consolidated and standalone financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Senseforth US to merge with Fractal US for operational synergies.
  • Fractal Frontiers Inc. liquidation approved to streamline structure.
  • B S R & Co. LLP issued an unmodified opinion on financial results.
  • Trading window closed until May 13, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRACTAL | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ABBOTINDIA] Abbott India FY26: Revenue ₹6,929.05 Cr, PAT ₹1,552.02 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Abbott India Ltd has announced its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The results, approved by the Board of Directors on May 11, 2026, show a revenue from operations of ₹6,929.05 Cr and a profit after tax of ₹1,552.02 Cr for the year ended March 31, 2026. The auditor's report, issued by M/s. Walker Chandiok & Co. LLP, has an unmodified opinion. The Board Meeting, where the results were approved, commenced at 6.00 pm and concluded at 7.30 pm.

  • Revenue from operations for FY26 stood at ₹6,929.05 Cr.
  • Profit after tax for FY26 was reported as ₹1,552.02 Cr.
  • Auditor's report by M/s. Walker Chandiok & Co. LLP has an unmodified opinion.
  • The Board approved the results on May 11, 2026.
  • Basic/Diluted EPS stood at ₹730.36 for the year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ABBOTT INDIA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MACINTR] Astal Labs Clarifies Price Movement Due to Market Conditions
item.description:
Astal Laboratories Ltd. has responded to a clarification sought by BSE regarding significant price movement in its scrip. The company stated that the price movement is purely due to market conditions and beyond the company's control or knowledge. Astal Labs affirms that it regularly disseminates all material and price-sensitive information in compliance with SEBI regulations and confirms there are no undisclosed events that could be affecting the stock's price or volume.

  • Astal Labs clarifies that recent price movement is due to market conditions.
  • The company states it has no control over or knowledge of the price surge.
  • Astal Labs confirms compliance with SEBI regulations regarding disclosures.
  • There are no undisclosed material events affecting the company's stock price.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Macro International Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [GEPIL] GE Power India Reappoints Deloitte as Statutory Auditor
item.description:
GE Power India Ltd's Board re-appointed Deloitte Haskins & Sells as Statutory Auditors for a second consecutive term of five years, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming AGM. Ernst & Young LLP was appointed as Internal Auditor, and Yogesh Gupta & Associates as Cost Auditor, both for FY 2026-27. The board meeting, held on May 11, 2026, commenced at 05:39 P.M. and concluded at 08:50 P.M.

  • Deloitte Haskins & Sells re-appointed as Statutory Auditors for five years, pending shareholder approval.
  • Ernst & Young LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Yogesh Gupta & Associates appointed as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Re-appointment of Deloitte is effective from the conclusion of the 34th AGM until the 39th AGM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GE Power India Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [ABBOTINDIA] Abbott India: Record Date for Dividend - July 24, 2026
item.description:
Abbott India Ltd has fixed Friday, July 24, 2026, as the record date for determining members' entitlement to the final dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The dividend, if approved at the Annual General Meeting, will be paid on or after Tuesday, August 18, 2026, to members whose names appear on the Register of Members and Beneficial Owners as of the record date.

  • Abbott India sets July 24, 2026, as record date for final dividend.
  • Dividend eligibility is for FY26, pending AGM approval.
  • Payment date for approved dividend is on or after August 18, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ABBOTT INDIA LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [NIACL] New India Assurance: FY26 Results Approved, ₹1.50 Dividend Declared
item.description:
The Board of Directors of The New India Assurance Company Ltd approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. A final dividend of ₹1.50 per equity share of face value ₹5 has been recommended, subject to shareholder approval. The record date for the dividend is set for September 4, 2026. The service of M/s MUF(3 Intime India Private Limited as Registrar and Transfer Agent (R&TA) has been extended.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Final dividend of ₹1.50 per share recommended.
  • Record date for dividend payment is September 4, 2026.
  • MUF(3 Intime India Private Limited's service as R&TA extended.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: The New India Assurance Company Ltd | Category: Dividend
